note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

Absolution.baseDescription: Taunt all enemies within 8 yds for 4 seconds and increase your movement speed by 50% for 4 seconds.

Aggramar's Rage.baseDescription: Increases your Holy critical strike chance by 6% and your expertise by 10.

modifyingTalents.description: Melee damage dealt now has a 10% chance to reduce the Energy cost of your next Argent Blade by -50%.
Increases the damage of Righteous Lunge and Argent Blade by 20%.
Every 2nd cast of Argent Blade now grants you Oath: Retribution.Oath: RetributionCritical damage increased by 5%.
Warrior of Dawn now also increases the damage and critical strike chance of your next Argent Blade by 20%.

Level 30 Passive
Casting Argent Blade while Warrior of Dawn is active now transforms your next Chastise into Scarlet Hammer.Scarlet HammerDrop a scarlet hammer on an enemy for 155% Weapon Damage plus 35 as Holy Damage and reduce their Armor by 555 for 10 seconds.
Argent Blade now has a 20% chance to strike an additional time.
Your Argent Blade now also extends the duration of Interdict on your target by 1 sec.
Damage dealt by Scourgebane now increases the damage of Argent Blade by 5% for 6 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Casting Argent Blade or Scarlet Hammer now guarantees your next 2 instances of damage dealt by Scourgebane to critically strike.

Increases the critical damage of Scourgebane by 15%.

Barrier of Light.baseDescription:
Emit saving light, increasing the healing received by nearby allies by 40% for 15 seconds.

For the duration, threat generated by your allies is redirected to you.

Battlepriest.baseDescription: While above 80% health or below 20% health, you now take 20% reduced Magic damage.

Bells of Light.baseDescription: Increases your Agility, Intellect, and hit chance by 6%

modifyingTalents.description: Benediction now grants your target armor based on your Agility and Stamina for 15 sec.
Increases the healing of Benediction by 30% and causes it to dispel 1 poison and disease effect.
Removes the cooldown from Benediction.
Casting Benediction now reduces the cost of your next Temple Guardian by -50% for 6 seconds.
Healing with Benediction now causes your next Benediction to heal for 25% more for 30 seconds.
Your Benediction now has a 1.5 sec cast time, but now heals for 100% more.

Binding Scripture.baseDescription: Healing an ally now redirects 10% of their damage taken to you and reduces your damage taken by -5% for 10 seconds, stacking 3 times.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Blade of Faith and Righteous Tempest by 25%.
Your Divine Force will now trigger a -30 sec reduced cooldown when used on enemies affected by Blade of Faith.

Dealing damage with Condemn, Holy Cleave, or Blade of Faith now has a 15% chance to trigger Zealotry if you are within melee range of your target.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.
Casting Righteous Upheaval or Blade of Faith now grants you Oath: Retribution and starts your Oath Chain.Oath: RetributionCritical damage increased by 5%.
Physical damage dealt now has a 25% chance to increase the tick rate and reduce cooldown of your next Blade of Faith by -10%, stacking 5 times.

Blessed Padding.baseDescription: Increases your Armor contribution from mail items by 100% and reduces damage taken from area of effect attacks by -20%.

Bursting Impact.baseDescription: Increases your off-hand weapon damage by 25%.

Call of the Monastery.baseDescription:
Increases the attack power of all party and raid members 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your attack power by 5%.

Calm Combatant.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your Holy spell damage by 30% of your attack power.

Chakra of Power.baseDescription: Melee attacks now restore 1 Energy, plus an additional 2 Energy when they critically strike.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Chastise now always triggers Scourgebane on your target.

Level 30 Passive
Casting Argent Blade while Warrior of Dawn is active now transforms your next Chastise into Scarlet Hammer.Scarlet HammerDrop a scarlet hammer on an enemy for 155% Weapon Damage plus 35 as Holy Damage and reduce their Armor by 555 for 10 seconds.
Your Righteous Lunge and Chastise used on enemies affected by your Condemn now deal 6% increased damage per stack.

Level 50 Passive
Your Chastise now deals an additional 50% Weapon Damage.

Your damaging critical strikes now increase your Holy damage dealt by 2% for 20 seconds. stacking 5 times. Can only occur once per sec.

At 5 stacks, you are granted High General.High GeneralYour next Chastise consumes all stacks of Scarlet Champion to deal 25% increased direct damage, and be guaranteed to critically strike.
While under the effect of a Libram, your Chastise will now unleash an 8 yd line of holy power, dealing 112 + 25% AP Holy damage.
Increases the damage of Chastise by 25% on enemies above 75% health or affected by Tranquil Circle.

Target an enemy and leap into the air. After a short delay, you blast them with immense holy force, dealing 1506 + 100% holy SP + 100% AP Holy damage to up to 10 enemies within 5 yds and reduces their damage and healing done by -10% for 5 seconds.

Damage dealt pierces all immunities, resistances, and damage absorption effects.

Scales with modifiers to Chastise.

Chivalric.baseDescription: Increases your critical damage with Holy spells and abilities by 15%.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Condemn now has a 15% chance to consecrate the earth around you with holy fervor, dealing 91 + 22.5% holy SP + 10% AP Holy damage to nearby enemies.
Damage dealt by Righteous Tempest now spreads Condemn on affected enemies to a nearby enemy.
Condemn now stacks 1 additional time.
Your Righteous Lunge and Chastise used on enemies affected by your Condemn now deal 6% increased damage per stack.

Increases the damage dealt by Righteous Tempest and Condemn by 30%.

Additionally, Righteous Tempest now reduces all damage taken by -20% while active.
Your Condemn now heals you for 75% of the damage dealt.

Periodic damage dealt by Condemn now has a 15% chance to increase your parry chance by 2% for 8 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Periodic damage dealt by Condemn also has a 15% chance to burst, dealing 100 + 22% AP Holy damage to up to 5 enemies within 5 yds of the target.
Increases the critical strike chance gained through Condemn by 3%.

Dealing damage with Condemn, Holy Cleave, or Blade of Faith now has a 15% chance to trigger Zealotry if you are within melee range of your target.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

Courage.baseDescription: Increases your movement speed and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects on you by -20%.

Crusader's Brand.baseDescription:
Brand an enemy for 20 seconds, preventing them from mounting, fleeing, or increasing their movement speed above normal movement speed and when they deal direct damage they take 243 + 27.5% holy SP + 18.5% AP Holy Damage.

While marked enemies can always be seen by the Crusader even while stealthed or invisible.

Disciplined Blows.baseDescription:
Your healing done triggers a holy pulse around healed targets, dealing 89 + 5% AP + 20% Agility Holy damage to nearby enemies.

Cnly occur once every 0.5 sec.

Divine Charge.baseDescription:
You and your party members leap upon a divine steed, increasing their movement speed by 100% and causing them to trample nearby enemies for 119 + 20% AP + 40% holy SP Holy Damage every 1 sec for 15 seconds.

While active, casting does not dismount you or your allies. Can only be used outdoors.

Divine Force.baseDescription: Leap at an enemy with divine force, stunning them for 6 seconds, dealing 20 + 100% SP + 55% AP Holy damage, and interrupting non-player spellcasting for 3 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of Divine Force by -30 sec.
Your Divine Force now strikes 2 additional enemies near the primary target.
Your Divine Force will now trigger a -30 sec reduced cooldown when used on enemies affected by Blade of Faith.

Level 50 Passive
Damaging abilities now grants you Unbroken Creed for 15 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

When you use a damaging Oath Breaker or Divine Fury you now consume the stacks and auto attack your target an amount of times equal to your stack count.
Damage dealt through Eternal Blessing now reduces the cooldown of Libram spells by -4 sec.

Finesse.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance by 4% and reduces the duration of disarm effects against you by -30%.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Oath Breakers now triggers Zealotry on your target and reduces the cooldown of Librams, Force of Golganneth, and Mortal Abdication by -1 sec.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

Fortified Body.baseDescription:
Allies within 40 yds receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.

Additionally, increases your maximum health by 6%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the effectiveness of Gift of Zeal by 20%.

Graceful Fighter.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your parry rating by 20% of Agility and your dodge rating by 20% of Intellect.

Heaven's Finest.baseDescription:
Damaging abilities now grant Heaven's Finest for 12 seconds, stacking 6 times.Heaven's FinestIncreases your movement speed by 5%.

At 6 stacks, increases your Energy regeneration by 100% for 8 seconds.

Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

modifyingTalents.description:
Your damaging critical strikes now increase your Holy damage dealt by 2% for 20 seconds. stacking 5 times. Can only occur once per sec.

At 5 stacks, you are granted High General.High GeneralYour next Chastise consumes all stacks of Scarlet Champion to deal 25% increased direct damage, and be guaranteed to critically strike.

Dealing damage with Condemn, Holy Cleave, or Blade of Faith now has a 15% chance to trigger Zealotry if you are within melee range of your target.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

Holy Constitution.baseDescription: Increases your damage dealt versus Undead by 5, scaling with level, and increases your chance to resist disease effects by 30%.

Interdict.baseDescription: Forbid an enemy from sinning, silencing them for 6 seconds. If they are an Undead or Demon they are unable to be healed for the duration.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Argent Blade now also extends the duration of Interdict on your target by 1 sec.
Increases the duration of Interdict by 2 sec and its cooldown by -5 sec.
Your Interdict now strikes 1 additional nearby target.

Judicator.baseDescription: Increases your parry and dodge chance by 3%.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Libram spells by -30 sec.
Your Libram spells now grant you 10% increased melee haste for 20 seconds.
While under the effect of a Libram, your Chastise will now unleash an 8 yd line of holy power, dealing 112 + 25% AP Holy damage.

Level 30 Passive
Using a Libram now removes 70% of the delayed damage from Oathkeeper.
Oathkeeper40% of damage taken is now delayed and dealt to you over 8 seconds.
Damage dealt through Eternal Blessing now reduces the cooldown of Libram spells by -4 sec.

Increases all party and raid member's melee and ranged haste by 10%. Does not stack with similar effects.

Damage dealt with auto attacks reduce the cooldown of Libram spells by -0.5 sec.
Using Libram spells now increases your damage dealt and healing done by 10% for 15 seconds.
Increases the damage dealt by Libram of Consecration by 100% and the effectiveness of your Librams by 25%.

Libram of Fervor.baseDescription: Read from your Libram of Fervor, granting you spell power equal to 30% of your Agility and attack power equal to 30% of your Intellect for 20 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Read from your Libram of Mortal Abdication, increasing your melee haste by 20% and causes your damaging abilities to reduce the cooldown of Righteous Upheaval by -2 sec for 20 seconds.

Libram of Tenacity.baseDescription: Read from your Libram of Tenacity, reducing your Physical Damage taken by -30% for 20 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Libram of Tenacity now also heals you for 20% of your maximum health.
Increases the duration of your Librams and Testaments by 10 sec.

Level 40 Passive
Casting Oath Breaker abilities now reduce the cooldown of Librams by -4 sec.

Casting Oath Breakers now triggers Zealotry on your target and reduces the cooldown of Librams, Force of Golganneth, and Mortal Abdication by -1 sec.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

Light's Chosen.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell power by 30% of your Agility and your critical strike rating by 15% of your Intellect.

Light's Ward.baseDescription:
Level 50 Passive
Increases all magic resistances equal to 10% of your dodge rating and reduces your damage taken from periodic effects by -15%.

Martial Paladin.baseDescription: Increases your Agility by 10% and your chance to hit by 6%.

Strike an enemy with zeal, dealing 31 + 28.5% AP + 35% SP Physical damage, triggering Zealotry, and granting an Oath.

Oath: Your damaging abilities have a 10% chance to trigger Zealotry.
Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.

Unleash a devastating Oath Breaker on an enemy dealing 119 + 140% SP + 70% AP Holy damage over 21 seconds. This ability can critically strike.

Consumes your Oaths, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

Unleash a whirling Oath Breaker, dealing Weapon Damage plus 7 + 25% SP damage to nearby enemies, scaling with spell power, every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

Consumes your Oaths, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

Unleash a powerful Oath Breaker, dealing 27 + 17.5% AP + 50% Stamina Holy damage and restoring 15 Energy for each enemy struck.

Consumes your Oaths, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

Casting Oath Breaker abilities now reduce the cooldown of Librams by -4 sec.

Consumes your Oaths, dealing additional damage for each consumed.

While active, Oath Breakers deal an additional 141 + 12% AP Holy damage to nearby enemies.

Paragon.baseDescription: Increases your Stamina by 10, plus an additional amount equal to 10% of your Agility.

Parry Dance.baseDescription: When you critically strike with auto attacks or parry an attack, your chance to parry is now increased by 3% for 5 seconds, stacking 5 times.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Reckoning now increases your Armor by 15% for 15 seconds.
Damage dealt by Sacred Swing and Reckoning now reduces casting speed by -10% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.
Increases the damage of Reckoning by 20%.

Sacred Defense.baseDescription: When you take Physical damage you now strike back at enemies for 15% of the damage dealt as Holy damage. Can only occur once per sec.

modifyingTalents.description:
Meditate for 15 seconds, restoring 5% of your maximum health every 1 sec and reducing damage taken by -50%.

Each second you will also remove 1 disease effect from yourself. 

Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.

Summons 2 copies of yourself that charge at a nearby enemy and aid you in combat for 20 seconds.

While within 15 yds of you, each copy reduces all damage you take by -10%. 

Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.
Reduces the cooldown of Testament of Faith by -60 sec and the duration of Sacred Restraint by -30 sec.

Break an ally free of worldly constraints, making them immune to all movement impairing effects for 10 seconds.

Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.

Chant a silverhand incantation and toss a holy hammer at your target, charging you to them and removing Sacred Restraint from you and them if they are an ally.

Upon reaching your target you deal 300 + 200% AP Holy damage to all nearby enemies and heal nearby allies for the same amount.

Your next 3 Titanstrikes are usable regardless of your target's health percentage and deal 25% increased damage. Lasts 1 minute.

Applies Sacred Restraint for 1 minute.Sacred RestraintCannot be targeted by Testaments.

Sacred Swing.baseDescription:
Swing at enemies in front of you, dealing 125% Weapon Damage plus 9, slowing their attack and movement speed by -20% for 10 seconds.

Only usable after avoiding an attack.

Casting Oath Breakers now triggers Zealotry on your target and reduces the cooldown of Librams, Force of Golganneth, and Mortal Abdication by -1 sec.Zealotry (Proc)Deals 40% off-hand Weapon Damage as Holy Damage.
